title: Social Media Manager for LinkedIn
description:
About Us

We are a leading LinkedIn Agency helping entrepreneurs, sales professionals, and business owners harness the power of LinkedIn for growth. We’re seeking an ambitious, results-driven LinkedIn Specialist to supercharge our presence and drive measurable business outcomes.



Job Description:

- Daily Content Posting: Craft and schedule compelling LinkedIn posts Monday through Friday to engage and add value for our Ideal Client Profiles (Using my AI tool)

- Community Engagement: Proactively comment, like, and interact with target audiences to foster relationships and boost visibility.

- Direct Messaging & Outreach: Engage with prospects via DMs, personalized connection requests, and relationship-first outreach that turn cold leads into warm conversations.

- Lead Generation: Leverage LinkedIn Sales Navigator and other best-in-class tools to build segmented, up-to-date prospect lists and support campaign efforts.

- Appointment Setting: Qualify leads, book sales meetings, and set appointments — moving prospects smoothly through the funnel.

- Pipeline Growth Strategy: Help design and implement repeatable systems and processes to ensure a steady flow of high-quality leads.

- Profile Optimization: Continually optimize our LinkedIn profile for maximum authority, clarity, and attractiveness for both inbound and outbound strategies.

- Community Building: Support and coordinate digital events, webinars, and roundtables to nurture our ecosystem and position us as a thought leader.

- Other duties assigned



Job Requirement:

- You’re fluent in LinkedIn strategies, etiquette, and growth hacks. LinkedIn is your playground.

- Engagement Pro: Obsessed with driving genuine conversations and building communities—not just racking up connection numbers.

-Skilled Writer: Capable of writing punchy, on-brand posts, comments, and messages that spark engagement and action.

-Sales Savvy: You understand sales pipelines, appointment setting, and the psychology of turning cold outreach into warm opportunities.

-Tech-Driven: Comfortable using Sales Navigator, automation tools, CRM systems, and
 campaign platforms.

-System Builder: You thrive on setting up processes, templates, and repeatable systems to scale results.

-Growth Mindset: Constantly seeking new ways to increase efficiency, learn new tactics, and help clients achieve measurable growth.



Why Join Us?

- Opportunity to leverage leading tools and work with a roster of elite clients.

- Flexible, remote-friendly role with a collaborative and growth-minded team culture.



Apply now by sending your resume and three examples of LinkedIn posts or campaigns you’ve managed.

title: Virtual Assistant (Property Services: Operations & Social Media Support)
description:
About Us

We are a fast-growing property services and compliance company supporting letting agents and landlords across Staffordshire and surrounding areas. We deliver services including inventories, checkouts, EPCs, and property inspections.

As our workload continues to grow, we are looking for a highly organised and proactive Virtual Assistant to support both our back-office operations and digital presence.



The Role

This is a key operational role supporting the day-to-day running of the business, while also helping to strengthen our online presence.

You’ll be responsible for keeping operations running smoothly behind the scenes, while also creating and managing engaging content across our social media platforms.



Key Responsibilities

???? Scheduling & Diary Management

• Booking appointments using our systems (InventoryBase & Acuity Scheduling)

• Managing reschedules and cancellations

• Ensuring both systems are always aligned

• Planning efficient daily routes for field staff



???? Daily Calls & Follow-Ups (Essential)

• Making outbound calls daily to tenants, landlords, and agents

• Confirming appointments and access arrangements

• Chasing availability where there is no response via

• Resolving access issues ahead of scheduled visits

• Representing the business professionally and confidently over the phone



????
 & Communication Management

• Monitoring and responding to
s professionally

• Sending confirmations, reminders, and updates

• Following up consistently to avoid delays



???? Job Processing & Admin

• Setting up jobs correctly in our system

• Ensuring correct templates are used (Inventory vs Checkout, etc.)

• Adding and checking contact details for reports

• Uploading and organising job information



???? Access & Key Coordination

• Managing key collections/returns

• Recording access notes clearly (tenant, agent, management keys)

• Flagging access issues early



???? Invoicing & Basic Finance Support

• Raising invoices (QuickBooks or similar)

• Ensuring all jobs (especially EPCs) are invoiced correctly

• Supporting with payment tracking and basic reconciliation



???? Social Media Content & Management

• Creating and scheduling content across:

o Instagram

o

o X 
)

o Threads

o (Potentially LinkedIn)

• Writing captions aligned with our brand tone (professional, human, engaging)

• Turning day-to-day operations into content (e.g. property visits, team updates, insights)

• Maintaining a consistent posting schedule

• Monitoring engagement and responding where appropriate

• Suggesting ideas to improve reach, engagement, and brand presence



???? General Admin Support

• Maintaining accurate internal notes

• Updating trackers and systems

• Supporting stock processes and reporting

• Assisting with process improvements





What We’re Looking For

? Essential

• Confident and professional on the phone (daily calling is required)

• Strong organisational skills and attention to detail

• Excellent written and spoken English

• Ability to manage multiple tasks and prioritise effectively

• Reliable, consistent, and proactive

• Comfortable using systems and learning new tools



???? Desirable (but not essential)

• Experience in property, lettings, or compliance

• Experience in a phone-based or customer service role

• Social media content creation experience (business accounts)

• Familiarity with scheduling tools (Acuity, Calendly, Meta Business Suite, etc.)

• Experience with CRMs or job management systems

• Basic accounting/invoicing experience

• Experience working with UK-based businesses



Working Style

• Fully remote

• Flexible hours (must align with UK business hours for calls)

• Clear processes and training provided

• Long-term opportunity with growth potential



Why Join Us?

• Be part of a growing, ambitious business

• Varied role combining operations and creativity

• Structured systems and clear expectations

• Supportive team environment

• Opportunity to grow into a senior operations or marketing role



How to Apply

Please include:

1. A short introduction about yourself

2. Your relevant experience

3. Any experience with phone-based roles

4. Examples of social media content you’ve created (if available)

5. Your availability (hours per week & timezone)



If you’re organised, confident on the phone, and enjoy both operations and creative work — we’d love to hear from you.

title: Music Technology Professor Needs Assistant – Video Organization & Spreadsheets
description:
Grammy-nominated music producer and college professor (Silicon Valley, CA) is building a library of online music technology courses and needs a skilled remote assistant to help organize a large archive of video tutorials and educational content into structured playlists and spreadsheets.



This is a part-time, ongoing remote position. Work is flexible, but some overlap with California evening hours is preferred.



WHAT YOU'LL DO



- Organize and sort a large archive of music technology video tutorials (bookmarks and other file collections) into new course playlists and categories

- Tag and classify videos by topic: Pro Tools, Recording Techniques, Mixing & Mastering, Music Theory, etc.

- Design and maintain Excel and Google Spreadsheets to manage course content and video data

- Convert Excel files to HTML using Claude (AI-assisted workflow)

- Handle general file management with strong attention to naming conventions, folder structure, and accuracy



REQUIREMENTS



Must have:

- Strong background in music production and audio engineering

- Hands-on experience with at least one DAW (Pro Tools, REAPER, Logic, Ableton, etc.)

- Advanced Excel and Google Sheets skills – you build and manage complex workbooks

- Solid HTML skills – you can read, write, and edit HTML files confidently

- Excellent file management habits – clean naming, logical folder structure, zero sloppiness

- Clear written English communication

- Fast, reliable internet connection

- Availability for some overlap with California afternoon or evening hours (PST)



Nice to have:

- Experience with bookmark/content management tools

- Familiarity with online course platforms (Teachable, Canvas, etc.)

- Background in music education

- Can read and write music notation



PRACTICAL DETAILS



- Start: Immediately, with a small paid test project to confirm fit

- Hours: Part-time, flexible (hours vary week to week)

- Remote tools: AnyDesk for occasional access to professor's Mac

- Location: Open to applicants worldwide; Philippines-based candidates welcome



TO APPLY



Please tell me:

1. Your background in music and audio production

2. What DAW(s) you use

3. Your spreadsheet and HTML experience – how long, what kinds of projects

4. Your availability and hourly rate

title: Personal and Business Coordinator
description:
Position Overview

The Personal and Business Coordinator provides administrative, operational, and coordination support to the Owner across multiple business activities. This role ensures the smooth day-to-day management of schedules, communications, documentation, and operational tasks related to real estate, retail operations, and other business initiatives.



The position requires strong organizational skills, attention to detail, and the ability to manage both personal and business-related responsibilities in a professional and confidential manner.



Key Responsibilities

1. Administrative and Operational Support

Manage the Owner’s daily schedule, calendar, and appointments.



Handle personal and business-related errands, tasks, and requests as assigned.



Maintain organized digital and physical files, records, and documents.



Prepare purchase requests, reimbursement forms, and basic spreadsheets.



Assist in preparing simple financial tracking such as petty cash, expenses, and inventory updates.



Coordinate with internal staff, suppliers, riders, couriers, and service providers.



Support the Owner in organizing business-related meetings, events, or travel arrangements.



Ensure the confidentiality of all personal and business information.



2. Real Estate Support

Assist in preparing property listings and descriptions for posting on relevant platforms.



Handle client coordination, inquiry follow-ups, and communication related to rentals, sales, and property viewings.



Prepare and organize real estate documents including reservation forms, accreditation requirements, leasing documents, and turnover documents.



Maintain updated records of available units, client concerns, and transaction timelines.



Coordinate with brokers, property managers, developers, and clients when needed.



Assist with property inspections, documentation, and onsite coordination when required.



3. Flower Café and Retail Shop Support

Assist with daily operational tasks including inventory checks, restocking, ordering supplies, receiving deliveries, and supplier coordination.



Support preparation of café and flower shop documentation such as price lists, product forms, marketing materials, and reports.



Coordinate with staff regarding daily store concerns, operational needs, and schedules.



Assist in social media coordination including preparing captions, uploading content, and monitoring inquiries.



Help maintain overall organization, cleanliness, and order of the café and flower studio.



Provide occasional support with store setup and product arrangements when needed.



4. Communication and Coordination

Serve as a point of contact for internal and external communications as directed by the Owner.



Respond to
s, messages, calls, and inquiries on behalf of the Owner when required.



Provide status updates, reminders, and follow-ups on pending tasks and deliverables.



5. Special Projects and Miscellaneous Tasks

Assist with special projects assigned by the Owner related to new business initiatives, events, or product launches.



Perform other reasonable duties necessary for the smooth operation of the Owner’s businesses.



Provide flexible support across different business areas depending on operational needs.



Key Skills and Qualifications

Strong organizational and time management skills



Excellent communication and coordination abilities



Ability to multitask and manage multiple responsibilities



Attention to detail and problem-solving skills



Ability to maintain confidentiality and professionalism



Basic knowledge of administrative systems, spreadsheets, and documentation

HOW TO APPLY (The Evidence Test)

Start your application with the words "LEKER SHARK."

title: Account Manager for Email Marketing Agency
description:
Hi!



I run a
 marketing agency focused exclusively on e-commerce brands. We’re a startup, so things move fast, priorities can shift, and not all processes are fully set in stone yet.



I’m looking for a Account Manager who will act as the creative motor for our clients accounts and help push real results.



THE ROLE

As Account Manager, you’ll be responsible for 5–6 e-commerce clients. You are the main strategic and creative force behind each account, working closely with both the designer and the operational manager to come up with strong ideas, campaigns, and concepts that drive growth.



This is not a passive role. You’re expected to proactively push ideas, challenge clients, and continuously improve performance.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

- Managing and owning 5–6 client accounts

- Acting as the creative lead for each account

- Coming up with: Campaign ideas (incl. copy if neccessary), Flow improvements, Creative concepts and test ideas

- Working closely with the
 designer to translate ideas into high-performing
s

- Working closely with Operational Manager to align strategy and expectations

- Creating clear briefs and giving structured feedback

- Planning and prioritizing
 campaigns and flows



KPIS & ACCOUNTABILITY

You will be held accountable for the following KPIs across your accounts:

- At least 20–30% attributed revenue from
 marketing

- 4–6 A/B tests per month

- Weekly call with Operational Manager (with me included)

- Client updates every Monday and Friday, clearly outlining: What has been done, What is live, What’s planned next



WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

- Proven experience with
 marketing for e-commerce

- Strong creative and strategic thinking

- Comfortable taking ownership and pushing ideas proactively

- Confident in client communication

- Able to work in a startup environment where not everything is fully documented

- Data-aware: understands performance, testing, and optimization within Klaviyo and
 Marketing overall



GROWTH OPPORTUNITY

If this collaboration works well, there is a clear long-term opportunity to:

- Take on more responsibility

- Help shape internal processes

- Grow into a senior or lead account manager role as the agency scales



HOW TO APPLY

Please include:

- A short introduction

- Your experience with
 marketing for e-commerce

- Examples of how you’ve driven growth or results for clients

- Your availability per week



Applications without relevant experience will not be considered.

title: VA- KDP Publishing Operations & Launch
description:
About This Role

Hill Country Publishing LLC is an independent publishing company producing non-fiction, self-help, business, and lifestyle titles across multiple genres and pen names. The catalog is actively growing with a structured launch sequence — multiple titles in production at any given time, spanning different audiences and subject areas.

This role exists to handle the operational layer of the publishing business: coordinating ARC (Advance Reader Copy) outreach, managing the review pipeline, executing launch tasks across Amazon KDP, and transitioning into ongoing market research as the catalog expands. The work is detail-oriented, process-driven, and genuinely important — reviews and launch execution are the primary levers that determine whether a self-published book succeeds or disappears.

This is a part-time role to start. For the right person who executes well, it grows into a long-term position with expanding responsibility across a growing multi-genre catalog.







How the Role Is Structured

The position has two distinct phases. The first six months are focused almost entirely on launching the current titles in the pipeline successfully. Once those launches are complete and generating reviews, the role transitions toward research and infrastructure for future titles across multiple genres.



Phase One

Launch & Reviews

Months 1–6





ARC Outreach and Coordination

•  Research and build a targeted list of ARC reviewers relevant to each title’s genre and audience — drawing from book communities on TikTok, Instagram, Goodreads, and genre-specific blogs

•  Identify 50–100 micro-influencers per title using genre-appropriate hashtags and community searches, targeting accounts with follower counts between 5K–50K and high engagement rates relative to their audience size

•  Find contact information (DM handles,
 addresses listed in bios, contact forms) and build a tracking spreadsheet with columns for platform, handle, follower count, engagement notes, contact date, response status, and copy sent

•  Send outreach messages using approved templates — all copy is pre-written and approved before sending; your job is accurate execution and tracking

•  Follow up once per contact, two weeks after initial outreach, using the approved follow-up template

•  Track all responses, log who is interested, coordinate digital copy delivery via BookFunnel or NetGalley (setup guidance provided), and update the tracker daily



Review Pipeline Management

•  Monitor Amazon reviews for both books daily and log all new reviews with date, star rating, and key content in the tracking sheet

•  Flag reviews that may warrant an author response (positive reviews worth acknowledging, critical reviews that contain factual errors) for author approval before any response is drafted

•  Track Goodreads reviews and ratings separately from Amazon

•  Send a weekly review summary every Monday with total review count, star rating average, notable new reviews, and any flagged items requiring attention

•  Monitor for verified vs. unverified purchase status on Amazon reviews and flag any patterns that look like policy violations for the author to assess



KDP Launch Execution

•  Manage the pre-launch checklist for each title: verify book description is live, confirm A+ Content is approved, check that all seven keyword fields are populated, confirm category selections are correct, and verify pricing is set correctly across all formats

•  Coordinate the $0.99 launch pricing window — set the price change date, confirm it goes live, and flag when it’s time to move to the next pricing tier per the approved schedule

•  Monitor Amazon Best Seller Rank (BSR) daily during launch week and log rankings in the tracking sheet every morning

•  Check that all book formats (ebook and paperback) are properly linked on the Amazon product page

•  Submit A+ Content updates when new material is provided by the author



Influencer and Community Outreach Tracking

•  Monitor for TikTok and Instagram posts mentioning the books or the author name and log any organic mentions in the outreach tracker

•  Screenshot and save any social media content featuring the books for the author’s records

•  Research and maintain a running list of BookTok creators, genre-specific influencers, and community figures who would be appropriate for outreach as new titles launch across different categories



Phase Two

Research & Catalog Growth

Months 6+





Niche and Market Research

•  Use Publisher Rocket, Book Bolt, and Amazon’s own search to identify keyword opportunities across the genres and categories in Hill Country Publishing’s active catalog

•  Monitor the top 20 competing titles in the primary categories monthly: track their review counts, BSR trends, pricing changes, and any new entrants worth flagging

•  Identify underserved niches across multiple genres — topics with demonstrated search demand, low competition, and weak existing titles — and surface them for the publisher’s consideration

•  Research content ideas for future books by monitoring what questions, topics, and pain points generate engagement in relevant Reddit communities, Goodreads groups, TikTok comment sections, and genre-specific online communities

•  Compile a monthly niche research report in a standard format (template provided) summarizing the top opportunities, notable competitor activity, and suggested focus areas for the author’s consideration



Ongoing Catalog Maintenance

•  Maintain a master spreadsheet tracking all published titles with current BSR, review count, star average, pricing, and active promotional status updated weekly

•  Flag titles whose rankings are declining significantly for the author’s attention

•  Research and shortlist Amazon Advertising keyword opportunities for the author to review and approve before any ads are created or modified

•  Coordinate ARC outreach for new titles as they enter the launch pipeline, using the established process from Phase One







What We’re Looking For

The most important qualities for this role are attention to detail, reliable follow-through, and clear communication. The tasks are well-defined and process-driven — what matters is executing them accurately and consistently, flagging issues when they arise, and never leaving the author wondering what’s happening.



Required

•  Prior experience with Amazon KDP — you understand the dashboard, know what BSR means, and have helped authors or publishers manage titles before

•  Experience with influencer or ARC outreach — you’ve built contact lists, sent templated outreach, and managed response tracking in a spreadsheet

•  Strong English written communication — outreach messages represent the author’s brand; grammar, tone, and professionalism matter

•  Reliable daily availability during the launch phase — launch weeks require morning check-ins and same-day updates, not 48-hour response windows

•  Proficiency in Google Sheets or Excel — you build clean, well-organized trackers and maintain them consistently



Preferred

•  Familiarity with Publisher Rocket, Book Bolt, or similar KDP research tools

•  Experience with BookFunnel or NetGalley for ARC distribution

•  Active presence in or familiarity with BookTok, Bookstagram, Goodreads, or genre-specific online reading communities

•  Experience supporting self-published authors specifically (not just Amazon FBA or retail sellers — the workflows are different)

•  Genuine interest in books and publishing across multiple genres — you read, you follow the industry, and you find the business of books interesting







What This Role Is Not

Being clear about this upfront saves everyone time.



•  You will not be writing copy, making editorial decisions, or creating content. All outreach messages, listing copy, and response drafts are written and approved by the author before you send or post anything.

•  You will not be making strategic decisions about pricing, categories, or advertising spend. You will execute decisions that have already been made and flag situations where a decision is needed.

•  You will not be managing social media accounts. Monitoring for mentions and logging them is part of the role; creating or posting content is not.

•  You will not need to purchase anything or access payment systems. Physical copy shipping (if needed) is handled separately.







Weekly Deliverables

Every week, the author expects the following with no chasing required:



•  Monday morning: Weekly review summary (new reviews across all platforms, star rating update, any flagged items)

•  Monday morning: ARC outreach tracker update (new contacts added, responses received, copies sent)

•  Friday afternoon: BSR and ranking log update for all active titles

•  As needed: Same-day flagging of anything urgent — a review that needs attention, a listing issue, an influencer response requiring follow-up



A note on communication style:



Weekly updates should be brief and scannable — bullet points, not paragraphs. If something needs the author’s decision or attention, say so directly in the first line. If everything is on track, say that clearly too. The author doesn’t want to read between the lines to figure out the status of their business.



Hours and Compensation

This role starts at 10–15 hours per week during the launch phase, with a higher concentration of hours in launch weeks (up to 20 hours during a book’s first two weeks on sale). Phase Two transitions to a more consistent 8–12 hours per week.



Growth Path

This role is designed to grow with the catalog. Hill Country Publishing LLC plans to publish multiple titles per year across a range of genres and audiences. A VA who executes Phase One well and demonstrates good judgment becomes the natural person to own the research and launch infrastructure for every title that follows — regardless of genre or pen name.

Longer-term, this could include coordinating with cover designers and formatters, managing a small ARC reader community, running Amazon Sponsored Products campaigns (training provided), and eventually leading the launch process for new titles with minimal author oversight. That growth depends entirely on demonstrated reliability in the foundational work first.







How to Apply

Please respond with the following. Applications that don’t include all four elements will not be reviewed — this is itself a test of whether you read and follow instructions carefully.



•  1. KDP experience summary: Describe specifically what you’ve done on Amazon KDP. What types of books, what tasks, how many titles, for how long. Generic "I have Amazon experience" does not qualify.

•  2. ARC or outreach example: Describe a specific outreach or review campaign you’ve managed. What was the book or product, how many contacts did you reach, what was the response rate, and how did you track it?

•  3. Tracker sample: Share a link to or screenshot of a spreadsheet you’ve built to manage a similar workflow. It doesn’t need to be KDP-specific — it needs to show that you build organized, functional tracking systems.

•  4. Availability and rate: Your weekly availability in hours, your timezone, your rate, and which platform you prefer to work through.



One more thing:

Start your application with the phrase “Ready to launch.” If you don’t, your application will not be reviewed. This confirms you read the full job description before applying.



Questions about the role can be asked before applying. We typically respond within 48 hours. Interviews are conducted via video call and are approximately 30 minutes. Successful candidates start with a paid two-week trial period before a longer-term agreement is confirmed.

title: Spopify Expert - Dropshipping
description:
Project Scope: PetCozy Store Optimization & Launch Prep – petcozy.shop

Objective

To transform PetCozy.shop from a basic template into a high-conversion, professional brand by fixing technical errors, enhancing the user experience (UX), and implementing a complete SEO and Trust framework.



Phase 1: Brand Integrity & Trust Configuration

Content Cleanup: Audit the entire site to fix typos and remove placeholder text. Crucial: Remove any mentions of external brands (e.g., "Petsstore," "Petsshop," "PetFindsUSA") from all pages and product titles.

Legal & Essential Pages: Build out and format the Contact, Shipping, Returns, and Privacy Policy pages.

Brand Story: Update the "Our Story" section with professional copywriting that aligns with the PetCozy brand.

Trust Signals: Integrate real trust badges (Secure Checkout, Satisfaction Guarantee) on product pages and the footer. Add clear contact information to the footer to build consumer confidence.



Phase 2: Shopping Experience & Conversion Optimization (CRO)

Collection Management: Organize products into logical collections. Implement advanced sidebar filters (Price, Pet Type, Size), sorting options, and pagination.

Product Page Overhaul: * Implement "Tabbed" descriptions (Description, Shipping Info, Specs).

Add a "Related Products" or "Frequently Bought Together" section.

Integrate a customer review app (e.g., Judge.me) with star ratings visible on collection pages.

Conversion Tools: Set up a subtle, non-intrusive newsletter pop-up and an automated Abandoned Cart recovery
 flow.

Mobile & UX Tweaks: Optimize the mobile layout for "thumb-friendly" navigation and ensure the "Add to Cart" process is seamless.



Phase 3: Technical Performance & SEO

Speed Optimization: * Compress all site assets and product images without losing quality.

Implement Lazy-Loading for images to improve Initial Page Load time.

On-Page SEO: * Rewrite Product Titles and Meta Descriptions to be "human-friendly" and keyword-optimized (no Amazon-style keyword stuffing).



Add descriptive Alt-Text to all images for Google Image search visibility.

Content Boost: Format the blog section and ensure the layout is clean for future content. Ensure Google Search Console and tracking are correctly configured.



Deliverable Requirements

Zero Placeholders: No generic "lorem ipsum" or "Template" text remaining.

Mobile First: The store must be fully responsive and load in under 3 seconds on mobile.

No Broken Links: All navigation links and social media icons must be functional.

title: Creator Partnerships Manager
description:
We run a OS app built to make calorie tracking feel effortless instead of exhausting. Instead of searching through endless menus or scanning barcodes, you can type what you ate like a quick message or snap a photo and let AI handle the rest. Logging takes seconds, gets faster over time as the app remembers your meals, and is designed so people actually stick with it. Rated 4.9 and loved by thousands.



This is not a generic social media role. This is a performance role focused on finding high volume right creators (
per day outreach), negotiating strong deals, getting creators signed, and getting first posts live.



Creators will film and post on their own TikTok and Instagram accounts. You will own creator sourcing, scoring, outreach, follow-ups, negotiation, scheduling, asset collection, pinned comments, and daily tracker updates so we can clearly see what is working.



We want someone who is already AI-native in real work. You should already use AI for sourcing, creator scoring, message drafting, research, notes, and reporting. This is not a fit for someone who only uses ChatGPT occasionally.



You will find creators on TikTok and Instagram, review their recent short-form view history, evaluate whether their comment sections look real, and assess whether their branded posts perform worse than their normal posts. You will d
 whether a creator is worth contacting, send cold outreach, keep follow-ups current, reply quickly to warm leads, negotiate four-video packages, brief creators, get first posts moving, collect raw assets, manage pinned comments, and keep reporting and tracker data updated daily.



We evaluate creators based on expected branded views, not follower count. If a creator’s last ten shorts average 50,000 views but their last three branded posts average 28,000 views, pricing is based on 28,000, not 50,000.



A qualified creator for us is someone with real short-form view history, content that fits fitness, weight loss, meal prep, grocery, or day-in-the-life, a real-looking comment section, branded posts strong enough to price from, and willingness to do a four-video package based on expected views.



A creator at final terms stage means pricing is actively being finalized in writing. A live first post means the first video is posted on the creator’s own account, the pinned comment is live, the raw asset has been collected, and the tracker has been updated.



Strong performance during the paid seven-day trial means sending 500 fresh DMs, keeping follow-ups current, maintaining a clean tracker, generating at least eight positive replies, starting at least five real negotiations with qualified creators, and either signing at least one creator or pushing at least two creators to final terms stage. We care about real deal progress, not fake activity.



Ongoing monthly performance means sending 2,000 fresh DMs every 30 days, generating at least ten positive replies from qualified creators, starting at least six real negotiations, signing at least four creators into four-video deals, and getting at least four first posts live. The tracker must be updated daily with pipeline status, pricing history, negotiation stage, posting dates, views, installs, trial starts, and revenue by creator.



Apply only if you have personally handled high-volume creator outreach, negotiated creator deals, owned outcomes rather than just awareness, and run your own tracker without constant supervision. This is not a fit for agencies, junior VAs, generic influencer marketers, gifting-only campaign managers, people who need constant supervision, or people who plan to pass the work to someone else after getting hired.



The hiring process starts with a JobStreet application, followed by a short screening form, then a video interview, then a paid seven-day trial, and finally an ongoing full-time contractor role if the trial is strong.



To apply, start your JobStreet application with the letter X. Shortlisted applicants will receive a screening form where you will answer two questions. The first asks what tools you use to find creators, send outreach at scale, and manage follow-ups without losing leads, and you must describe your actual stack. The second asks how you would price a creator whose last ten shorts average 50,000 views but whose last three branded posts average 28,000, and at what cost-per-install the deal stops making sense.



You must also include your price for the paid seven-day trial.



We’re so excited to hear from you.

title: Experienced Funnel Builder (Direct Response & Design Expert) - BONUSES UP TO 1500 USD
description:
About Us

We are a fast-growing branded dropshipping e-commerce company in the beauty & health niche, focused on direct response marketing. Our funnels are highly optimized for conversions, leveraging consumer psychology, strong copywriting, and engaging visuals to maximize sales.



We are looking for a Funnel Builder who is not just technically skilled but also deeply understands direct response marketing, persuasive copywriting, and conversion-focused design. You should have experience with high-converting sales funnels and be able to craft funnels that engage, persuade, and drive action.



Your Role & Responsibilities

1) Funnel Building & Optimization

Build high-converting funnels (with FUNNELISH) optimized for sales, lead generation, and upsells.

Set up and optimize landing pages, checkout pages, upsells, and order bumps.

Perform A/B testing to improve conversions.



2) Direct Response Copywriting & Marketing Strategy

Write highly persuasive, conversion-driven copy for landing pages and sales funnels.

Apply AIDA (Attention, Interest, Desire, Action) principles in funnel creation.

Use psychological triggers (urgency, scarcity, curiosity) to increase conversions.

Research and develop effective hooks, offers, and messaging based on audience psychology.



3) Graphic Design

Create scroll-stopping, conversion-focused designs for funnels.

Work with tools like Canva, Photoshop, or Figma to design high-impact visuals.

Ensure all design elements support the direct response marketing goals.

Develop and implement brand-consistent, persuasive visuals that align with the sales copy.



4) Data Analysis & Funnel Performance Optimization

Analyze funnel performance

Track key metrics like conversion rates, drop-off points, and average order value (AOV).

Adjust copy, visuals, and funnel steps based on data insights.



Who We’re Looking For

- Master’s Degree (Preferred) – Preferably in Marketing, Business, Psychology, or Design.

- 2+ Years of Experience in Funnel Building, Copywriting & Design – You should have real experience in high-converting funnels in branded dropshipping

- Expert in Direct Response Marketing – You understand consumer psychology, urgency, and persuasion techniques.

- Proven Copywriting Skills – You know how to write sales pages that convert (not just "nice" copy, but direct response copy).

- Strong Graphic Design Ability – You should have a good eye for layout, branding, and ad creatives.

- Funnelish Experience (Preferred) – Prior work with Funnelish is a huge plus, but experience with ClickFunnels, GoHighLevel, or similar platforms is also great.

- Highly Analytical & Data-Driven – You base funnel optimizations on real performance metrics.

- Fluent in English – You can write clear, persuasive copy and communicate well.



Why Join Us?

- Work in a fast-paced, high-converting e-commerce environment.

- Gain hands-on experience in direct response marketing & sales psychology.

- Use your skills to create funnels that generate real revenue.

- Fully remote with flexible work hours.

- Opportunities for bonuses & growth based on performance.



How to Apply

- Submit your resume + portfolio of funnels & copywriting samples.

- Tell us why you’re the perfect fit.

- Begin your message with 2025VPC



We’re looking for smart, driven individuals who can create funnels that SELL. If you have the skills and experience, we want to hear from you!

title: Conversion Specialist (Remote + flexible hours)
description:
Help scale brands. Own performance. Drive real revenue.



GTE is a fast-growing global eCommerce company focused on building and scaling brands across international markets. Here, ideas don’t stay theoretical — they translate into real growth.



We’re looking for a Conversion Specialist who is ready to own product page optimization, improve conversion rates, and maximize average order value across large product catalogs.



?? Please Do NOT Apply If:

- You don’t have 3+ years experience in e-commerce conversion optimization

- You haven’t worked on large product catalogs (100+ SKUs)

- You don’t understand direct-response copywriting or consumer psychology

- We value clarity and efficiency — for both you and us.



Why This Role Matters

Conversion optimization is a core revenue driver at GTE. In this role, you’ll play a key part in scaling brands by improving conversion rates, AOV, and overall product page performance.



This is a hands-on role for someone who wants:

- Full ownership of product performance

- A performance-driven environment

- The ability to directly influence business results



What You’ll Own & Build



Within your first 90 days, success will be measured by your ability to:

- Optimize 100+ product pages for conversion and AOV

- Identify and fix bottlenecks in product funnels

- Improve page elements (copy, layout, visuals, offers) to increase conversion >50%

- Run A/B tests that move the needle and generate measurable revenue

- Turn basic supplier images into high-converting visuals

- Make data-driven decisions between design vs offer problems





We’re excited to work with someone who:

- 3+ years of hands-on e-commerce conversion optimization experience

- Shopify experience is required (running or working with stores)

- Proven track record of increasing conversion rates / revenue

- Strong copywriting / direct-response skills

- Deep understanding of consumer psychology and buying behavior

- Analytical, results-driven, and comfortable being measured on revenue impact

Bonus: Experience with dropshipping, affiliate marketing, or DTC brands



Only apply if you meet the above requirements. We’re building a high-performance team, and this role requires proven experience with direct response marketing.



Compensation & Benefits

- Base hourly rate is negotiable for strong candidates

- Quarterly bonus up to €2,500 (eligible within first 6 months)

- Full-time, flexible schedule (40 hours/week)

- Fully remote



Hiring Process

- HR Screening -> Interview -> CEO Interview



Ready to Make an Impact?

If you’re driven by performance, optimization, and measurable growth, we’d love to hear from you.





APPLY HERE:

title: Executive Assistant to CEO
description:
Position Overview:



As the Executive Assistant to the CEO, you will play a pivotal role in ensuring the smooth and efficient functioning of the executive office. Your primary responsibility will be to provide comprehensive administrative support to the CEO, managing their schedule, and coordinating various tasks to enhance productivity. Your ability to maintain confidentiality, exercise sound judgment, and proactively handle administrative duties will contribute to the overall effectiveness of the CEO's office.





Pay Range: $8 per hour with a performance review scheduled after 90 days of employment. We believe in rewarding exceptional talents.





About Power Plus Systems:



Power Plus Systems LLC has been a dominant force in the residential electrical contracting industry for two decades, and we continue to lead the way. Our vision is to successfully wire 28,000 homes to completion by the year 2029, ensuring safe and efficient electrical solutions, thereby making a positive impact on the lives of our customers and communities. At Power Plus Systems, LLC, a position with us isn't just a job; it's an opportunity to grow and develop within a company that genuinely appreciates your contributions and dedication to our shared mission.





Objectives:

• Manage and organize the CEO's daily schedule, including meetings, appointments, and travel arrangements.

• Act as a gatekeeper, screening and prioritizing communications to the CEO.

• Coordinate and facilitate communication between the CEO and internal/external stakeholders.

• Anticipate the CEO's needs and proactively handle tasks to ensure optimal time management.

• Coordinate special projects and initiatives as assigned by the CEO.





Competencies:

• Exceptional organizational and multitasking skills, with keen attention to detail.

• Strong written and verbal communication skills.

• Ability to maintain confidentiality and exercise discretion in handling sensitive information.

• Proficient in using Microsoft Office and Google Suites.

• Familiarity with scheduling software; experience with additional productivity tools is an advantage.

• Strong interpersonal skills with the ability to interact effectively with individuals at all levels.

• Proactive problem solver and resourceful thinker.





Equipment Requirements:

• Must own a reliable computer or laptop capable of handling administrative tasks efficiently.

• Must own and actively use an iPhone and/or MacBook or Mac computer for efficient communication and task management.

• High-speed internet connection to support video calls, cloud-based collaboration, and remote work.



Physical Requirements:

• Extended periods of sitting at a desk and working on a computer.



Benefits:

• Growth opportunities in a well-established company.

• Ongoing training and professional development opportunities.

• Opportunity for advancement within the company.

• A supportive and collaborative work environment.

• Company-observed paid United States holidays (full time).

• Paid vacation.





How to Apply:



If you are ready to join Power Plus Systems, LLC, a well-established residential electrical contractor that values its tea
mbers and offers excellent benefits, please submit your application through the link below.




/internationalcareers



Power Plus Systems, LLC is an equal opportunity employer and welcomes applicants from all backgrounds to apply.



Join us at Power Plus Systems, LLC, and be part of our continued success as we embark on the next 20 years of excellence in residential electrical contracting!

title: Customer Service Officer
description:
Dear Applicants,



## Customer Service Officer – We're Hiring! ##



We're a fast-growing brand with an engaged, loyal customer base — and as we scale our channels and campaigns, we need someone reliable at the heart of our customer experience. You'll be the person our customers reach when they have questions, the one keeping our records clean, and the engine that keeps our CRM campaigns running on time.



IMPORTANT: If you lack experience, you at least need to have a strong creative instinct and the ability to learn quickly. We value responsible, self-motivated people who take ownership of their work and can deliver quality results with minimal supervision.



Job Scope:

- Handle customer enquiries, feedback, and incoming leads across messaging channels (currently WhatsApp; TikTok to be added)

- Process customer registrations and maintain accurate, up-to-date records

- Monitor and update lead status across the pipeline

- Support CRM campaigns including Holiday programmes, broadcasts, promotions, and follow-up flows



Note:

- Full-time basis – 35 hrs/week (up to 40 hrs during peak periods)

- Monday to Friday: 1pm–8pm (SGT), Saturday: 9am–3pm (SGT) — 6 days per week, each shift inclusive of a 1-hour break

- 14 days of Paid Annual Leave and Paid Public Holidays Benefits (all major holidays in the Philippines) included



IMPORTANT: When applying, please provide:

- Your CV/Resume

- A short video introduction of yourself and why you think you're a good fit

- Why you are leaving your last job or what you were doing just before this application

- Examples of any customer service, admin, or CRM-related work you have done previously. If you do not have prior experience, please be honest and state so — we are open to fast learners with the right attitude



Applications without the above points will be less considered.



P.S. Please format your replies in point form according to the items asked above, e.g.:

My resume is here:

Video introduction here:

I am currently doing... / I am leaving because...

Here are examples of my work...



The more information you provide in your initial application, the better.



Best regards,

Loo Yi

title: Social Media Manager
description:
SUMMARY



We are seeking a Social Media Manager who will be responsible for creating content and developing strategies that drive creator growth and brand impact. This role combines creativity with data-driven decision-making, crafting engaging content, optimizing influencer collaborations, and supporting creators to grow their audience and influence.



RESPONSIBILITIES



- Plan, launch, and optimize influencer marketing campaigns across specific assigned social media platforms

- Collaborate with internal teams to align influencer initiatives with brand campaigns, product and launches

- Track, measure, and report campaign performance using key metrics such as reach, engagement, conversions, and ROI.

- Stay updated on social media trends, platform updates, and emerging creators to keep campaigns fresh and competitive.

- Experiment with new formats (e.g., livestreams, co-branded content, affiliate partnerships) to drive growth and engagement.



QUALIFICATIONS



- Fluent in English (written and spoken)

- PREFERRED: 2+ years of experience in social media management, influencer coordination, or content scheduling

- Familiar with posting and scheduling on social media

- Quick learner who follows instructions well

- Highly organized and able to manage multiple accounts simultaneously

- Strong communication and teamwork skills

title: Ecommerce Executive (Shopee, Tiktok, Lazada Manage Seller Center)
description:
URGENT HIRING. MUST HAVE EXPERIENCED IN END-TO-END ECOMMERCE OPERATIONS



Join our team and become part of a dynamic, global organization of 40 professionals across Korea, Singapore, Malaysia, and the Philippines. Collaborate closely with our regional teams to grow an exciting portfolio of leading Korean brands, including Beauty of Joseon, Needly, Tirtir, and other top-trending names in the market.



We are seeking a confident and experienced tea
mber who can independently oversee e-commerce operations, take proactive initiative, and consistently deliver results with minimal supervision, ensuring long-term success and stability in the role.



Key Responsibilities:



- Serve as the Point-in-Charge (PIC) and technical expert for the BigSeller platform, providing system guidance, troubleshooting, and workflow optimization.

- Stay updated on BigSeller feature releases and system enhancements, implementing updates to improve operational efficiency.

- Manage product listings across multiple online platforms (Shopee, Lazada, TikTok Shop), ensuring accuracy, quality, and completeness (basic photo editing and product research).

- Monitor pricing strategies and campaign promotions (e.g., 11.11, 12.12, Payday Sales) to drive sales growth performance.

- Track and analyze sales data, competitor activity, inventory levels, and shipment status, preparing actionable performance reports.

- Confidently present weekly and monthly data to management, translating complex metrics into clear strategies.

- Maintain overall e-commerce account health, coordinating with teams to resolve customer service issues, refunds, returns, and fraud cases.

- Collaborate with cross-functional teams and provide ad-hoc support for campaigns and special projects.



Qualifications:



- 2–5 years of hands-on experience managing e-commerce operations on Shopee, Lazada, TikTok Seller Centre or Account, or similar is required.

- Strong understanding of online campaign management, pricing strategies, and platform algorithms.

- Proficient in Google sheets and Excel. Managing large datasets, utilizing advanced formulas (e.g., VLOOKUP, Pivot Tables), and generating performance reports.

- Highly organized, able to prioritize tasks and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.

- Strong communication skills with the ability to work effectively in multicultural teams.



Benefits:

- Stable full time employment with leave benefits, up to 14 days annual leave, public holiday leave, birthday leave.

- Travel Opportunity to Singapore based on performance.

- Comfortable work environment, same working time zone as Philippines (GMT +8).

- Structured salary increase and promotion based on performance.

- Seeking a dedicated full-time and long term role.



To apply, please answer a few short pre-screening questions via the Google Form linked below. This helps us better understand your background and fit for the role before the interview stage.




/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdK1SHQ9UNeQq98nRv_IetlncCT1GozUDZ8RnMbYB9de6pbHg/viewform?usp=sharing&ouid=
We appreciate your interest and look forward to hearing from you!

title: Digital Marketing Analyst
description:
Overview

We are seeking a detail-oriented Digital Marketing Analyst to support our advertising data analytics efforts. This role is ideal for someone with strong analytical skills who can translate campaign data into actionable insights, optimize tracking, and improve overall marketing performance.



Key Responsibilities

Analyze advertising performance data across multiple platforms and campaigns

Build and maintain reporting dashboards using Microsoft Excel and Google Analytics (GA4)

Develop clear, actionable insights based on campaign performance and key metrics

Set up, manage, and troubleshoot tracking using Google Tag Manager (GTM)

Implement and manage pixel tracking for platforms such as Meta, X 
), and LinkedIn

Consolidate data from various advertising channels into cohesive reports

Ensure accuracy and consistency of tracking, tagging, and data collection

Collaborate with marketing teams to improve campaign measurement and performance



Requirements

Strong proficiency in Microsoft Excel (advanced formulas, data analysis, reporting); certification is a plus

Hands-on experience with Google Analytics (GA4), including report creation and data analysis

Experience using Google Tag Manager for tag implementation and tracking setup

Ability to analyze data from multiple sources and present insights clearly

Strong attention to detail and problem-solving skills

Excellent communication skills with the ability to explain data to non-technical stakeholders



Preferred Qualifications

Experience with pixel tracking for Meta, X 
), LinkedIn, or similar platforms

Background in digital advertising analytics or performance marketing

Familiarity with dashboard tools (e.g., Looker Studio or similar)

Experience working with marketing or growth teams

title: B2B Lead Generation, LinkedIn Outreach
description:
I run a financial consulting and business valuation firm that works with lenders, brokers, and business owners on transactions and financing.



I’m looking for a detail-oriented assistant to support daily outreach and CRM tracking. This is a structured, repeatable role with clear instructions.



What You’ll Do

Build targeted contact lists (SBA lenders, commercial lenders, business brokers, consultants)

Send LinkedIn connection requests and messages

Send
 outreach campaigns

Track all activity in a spreadsheet

Execute follow-ups based on defined timelines

Keep data clean, organized, and up to date



What You Won’t Do

You will NOT create marketing strategy

You will NOT write messaging from scratch

You will NOT “experiment” with outreach



Requirements

Strong written English (clear, professional tone)

High attention to detail

Organized and consistent

Experience with Lead Generation, LinkedIn and/or
 outreach required

Comfortable working with spreadsheets or CRM tools



Work Structure

Part-time to start (2–4 hours/day).

Flexible schedule, but must complete daily tasks consistently

Daily written report. Timesheet is not required.

Long-term role if performance is strong



How to Apply (Important)



Please include:

A short description of your experience with outreach, lead generation, and LinkedIn

A sample list of 5 SBA lenders or business brokers (Name, Title, Company, LinkedIn URL)



Applications without this sample will not be considered.



I am looking for someone who:

- Follows instructions precisely

- Works consistently every day

- Communicates clearly

- Takes ownership of execution

title: Project Manager
description:
Job Title: Project Manager (Digital Marketing & Coaching Focus)

Remote | Full-Time | Cross-Functional Teams



We’re looking for a highly organized and proactive Project Manager with a passion for digital marketing, personal development, and coaching. In this role, you won’t just manage timelines—you’ll lead client and internal projects from start to finish, ensuring everything runs smoothly, efficiently, and with purpose.



If you thrive in fast-paced environments, enjoy working with creative and strategic teams, and know how to keep digital campaigns on track while fostering positive relationships, this one’s for you.



As our Project Manager, you’ll own multiple client and internal projects across the coaching and digital marketing space. You’ll lead initiatives related to content creation, campaign launches,
 marketing, funnel builds, virtual events, and more—coordinating across departments like design, copywriting, and tech.



You’ll be the central point of alignment, keeping deliverables on track, supporting client needs, and ensuring deadlines are met without sacrificing quality.



Key Responsibilities

-Lead the planning, execution, and delivery of digital marketing & coaching-related projects

-Serve as the primary liaison between internal teams, stakeholders, and clients

-Define project goals, timelines, and deliverables aligned with business and coaching outcomes

-Coordinate across content, design, automation, and client success teams

-Manage timelines using tools like ClickUp, Trello, or Asana

-Run daily/weekly stand-ups, team syncs, and progress check-ins

-Create and improve SOPs, workflows, and systems that enhance team efficiency

-Maintain organized documentation, task tracking, and communication logs



What We're Looking For

-2–5 years of project management experience, preferably in digital marketing or coaching industries

-Proven ability to lead cross-functional teams and juggle multiple active projects

-Familiarity with marketing campaigns, launches, or coaching program operations

-Strong experience using project/task management tools (ClickUp, Asana, Trello, etc.)

title: B2B Appointment Setter / Outbound SDR (LinkedIn + Cold Email) | SME and Accounting Firms
description:
I am the founder of Onwards Capita, a fractional CFO and finance execution firm helping SMEs improve cash visibility, working capital discipline, and short-term financial control.

I am hiring one disciplined outbound SDR / appointment setter based in the Philippines to help me generate qualified meetings.

This is not a strategy role.

This is not a closing role.

This is not a content-writing role.

I will provide:

• the target personas

• the outreach strategy

• the message scripts

• the one-pagers / sales material

• the qualification logic



Your role is to execute with discipline:

• identify the right targets

• run outbound on LinkedIn and cold

• follow up consistently

• manage replies and booking flow

• keep the CRM and tracking clean



Scope split

• 80% of your work: outreach to SME founders / decision-makers for a cash control / liquidity offer

• 20% of your work: outreach to accounting firm partners in Singapore and Malaysia for an early-stage pilot offer



What you will do

• Build and verify targeted prospect lists using LinkedIn Sales Navigator and other approved tools

• Identify decision-makers in our target markets and ICPs

• Run structured outbound sequences across:

o LinkedIn connection requests and follow-ups

o cold
 outreach and follow-ups

• Manage responses and keep communication professional, concise and accurate

• Handle basic replies using our pre-approved frameworks

• Escalate nuanced conversations to me

• Push qualified prospects to book a 10–15 minute intro call on my calendar

• Keep records clean in our CRM / tracker

• Report clearly on:

o prospects added

o touches sent

o positive replies

o meetings booked

o meetings held

o pipeline quality



Important

You will not use my personal LinkedIn account.

You will conduct LinkedIn outreach from your own professional profile and use a company
 address for cold
.



Ideal profile

You are a good fit if:

• You have real experience booking B2B meetings through LinkedIn and cold

• Your written English is strong and professional

• You are comfortable reaching out to founders, partners, recruiters, and senior decision-makers

• You know how to research and target properly instead of blasting low-quality lists

• You are organized, responsive, and reliable

• You understand CRM hygiene and follow-up discipline

• You do not need hand-holding every day

Strong advantage if you have

• Experience in B2B SaaS, financial services, consulting, accounting, or high-ticket services

• Experience prospecting Singapore, Malaysia, or US-based businesses

• Experience using LinkedIn Sales Navigator, Apollo, HubSpot, Zoho, or similar tools



Contract structure

• initial 4-week paid test engagement

• 20–25 hours/week

• If performance is strong, this will become a longer-term retainer

Compensation

• Base during 4-week trial: $400–$600/month equivalent, depending on experience, quality, and availability

• Hours: roughly 20–25 hours/week to start

• Bonus: $30 for each qualified meeting held

• Bonus: $200 for each SME client you sourced that signs and pays the first invoice

• Bonus: $30 for each qualified accounting firm partner meeting held

• Bonus: $300 when an accounting firm enters into a formal pilot contract discussion 



What success looks like

In the first 4 weeks, I expect:

• disciplined execution

• strong targeting quality

• clean tracking

• professional communication

• steady follow-up

• qualified meetings, not junk meetings



To apply

Start your application with the words: CASHCONTROL

Then include the following:

1. A short summary of your outbound experience

2. Which tools you have used: Sales Navigator, Apollo, Lemlist, Instantly, HubSpot, Zoho, etc.

3. Two examples of B2B outbound messages you personally sent that led to a booked meeting

4. Which geographies and seniority levels you have prospected before

5. Your availability over the next 4 weeks

6. Your expected monthly compensation for a 20–25 hour/week trial

Low-effort, generic applications will be ignored.

title: Media Buyer (Facebook/Meta, YouTube/Google Ads)
description:
We are Singapore’s fastest growing performance marketing agency seeking



Media Buyer (Direct Response | Performance-Focused)

Full-Time | Remote



About TRES



TRES is a Singapore-based performance marketing agency working with coaches, speakers, consultants, and education businesses across Asia. We specialise in direct-response campaigns — webinars, challenges, application funnels, and high-ticket offers — where real money is spent daily and performance matters.



We’re also part of a broader group that operates:

Play Bigger Mentoring (our education & mentoring brand)

Intellia (our proprietary GoHighLevel-based CRM & funnel platform)



All brands are owned and operated by the same team. This role sits fully within the TRES performance team.





Why This Role Is Different



This is not a branding or “boost post” role.



You’ll be working on:

- Real conversion campaigns

- Meaningful daily ad spend

- Funnels where decisions have real impact



You’ll follow proven SOPs — and you’ll also be trusted to make judgment calls when performance requires it.



If you want to grow fast by working close to real data, real money, and real decisions, this role will stretch you in the right way.





What You’ll Do



- Run and optimise conversion-focused paid ad campaigns (Meta primarily & YouTube next)

- Monitor campaign performance and flag issues early

- Own campaign health, not just execution

- Follow SOPs by default and make informed adjustments when needed

- Escalate performance issues and opportunities to the Ops Manager

- Participate in scheduled weekend monitoring for selected high-spend campaigns

- Join structured ad setup / implementation sessions for mentoring and Intellia launches (scheduled, SOP-led, execution-focused)



You’ll mainly receive all priorities and inputs from a single Ops Manager — no creative or stakeholder chaos.





What You Will NOT Be Responsible For

- Writing ad copy or designing creatives

- Redesigning funnels, offers, or pricing

- Handling client communication or account management

- Juggling multiple stakeholders or unclear priorities



Your focus is campaign performance and health, with clear boundaries and structure.





Who This Role Is For

This role is a good fit if you:

- Have hands-on experience running conversion ads (leads or sales)

- Are comfortable in performance-driven environments

- Stay calm, analytical, and accountable when things move fast

- Respect structure but don’t freeze when conditions change

- Communicate clearly and take ownership seriously



Who This Role Is NOT For

- “Set-and-forget” ad managers

- Freelancers juggling multiple clients

- People looking for a low-pressure, purely 9–5 role

- Anyone uncomfortable with responsibility tied to real spend





Compensation & Growth



At TRES, compensation is more than a monthly paycheck.



You’ll be operating in an ecosystem where:

- 6-figures are spent on paid ads monthly

- Multiple six figures are invested yearly into business, operations, education, health, and performance

- Decisions are made using real data, real risk, and real outcomes



What This Means for You

- Exposure to high-spend, direct-response campaigns

- Learn world-class media buying and direct response practices

- Grow beyond ads — into business thinking, systems, and personal performance

- Performance bonuses for strong execution and decision-making

- Opportunities to join yearly team retreats and overseas events held a few times a year



If you’re looking for comfort, this isn’t it.



If you’re looking to level up fast and grow properly, you’ll thrive here.



The questions are designed to understand how you think, not just what tools you’ve used.

Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.



Final Note

We’re not looking for button-pushers.

We’re looking for media buyers who:

Respect structure

Protect campaign performance

Take ownership seriously

If that sounds like you, we’d love to hear from you.



How to Apply

Please complete the application form carefully.



Apply here:

title: Website/Landing Page/Funnel Graphic Designer
description:
We are Singapore’s fastest growing performance marketing agency seeking

Website/Graphic Designer

(1 full-time, remote position available)



We are Singapore’s fastest-growing performance marketing agency helping speakers, coaches, and service-based businesses build and scale million-dollar offers through paid ads and sales systems.



We are looking for a high-performance Website / Funnel Graphic Designer who understands conversion-driven design, mobile-first layouts, and AI-powered design workflows.



This is not a typical graphic design role.



You will be responsible for creating designs that directly impact revenue, including landing pages, ad creatives, webinar slides, and funnel assets.



You will work closely with our media buyers, copywriters, and funnel builders to produce high-converting marketing assets.



?



Who This Role Is For



You are someone who:

 • Designs clean, modern, conversion-focused layouts

 • Understands how design affects marketing performance

 • Is obsessed with spacing, alignment, and visual hierarchy

 • Thinks mobile-first

 • Uses AI tools to speed up and improve design workflows

 • Can execute quickly without sacrificing quality



If you only design pretty graphics but do not understand marketing, this role will not be a good fit.



?



What You Will Be Designing



You will create graphics and layouts for:



•?  ?Landing pages and funnels

•?  ?Static ad creatives for paid ads

•?  ?Webinar and training slides

•?  ?Membership site assets

•?  ?Marketing posters and event materials

•?  ?Funnel sections and conversion elements



Your designs must be clean, persuasive, and optimized for conversion.



?



Core Responsibilities



Design high-converting landing page layouts using strong visual hierarchy.



Create high-performing ad creatives for paid advertising campaigns.



Design webinar and training slides that improve speaker credibility and student engagement.



Collaborate with copywriters and media buyers to translate messaging into visual layouts.



Ensure all landing pages are modern, clean, and mobile responsive.



Support A/B testing of visual elements to improve performance.



Apply UX and conversion best practices in all marketing designs.



Organize and maintain structured design systems and reusable templates.



Document repeatable processes into internal design SOPs.



Stay updated with design trends, AI tools, and marketing creative strategies.



?



Required Skills (Must Have)



Modern Conversion Design



You must understand:

 • Visual hierarchy

 • Conversion-focused layouts

 • CTA placement

 • Color psychology

 • Typography systems



Mobile-Responsive Design (Mandatory)



All designs must be mobile optimized.



You must understand:

 • Mobile spacing

 • Readable font sizes

 • Button tap areas

 • Layout stacking

 • Mobile-first UX



If you do not design mobile-first, this role will not be suitable.



?



AI Design Tools (Mandatory)



You must have experience using AI tools to accelerate design workflows, including tools such as:

 • Lovable

 • Nano Banana

 • Gemini

 • AI design assistants or generators



We expect designers to use AI as leverage, not replacement.



?



Tools



You must be comfortable working with:



•?  ?Figma

•?  ?Canva

•?  ?GoHighLevel (GHL)

•?  ?Photoshop or similar design tools



?



Experience Required



You must have experience designing for:



•?  ?Landing pages

•?  ?Marketing funnels

•?  ?Paid ads

•?  ?Webinar slides

•?  ?Marketing campaigns



Experience in performance marketing or funnel design is highly preferred.



?



Personal Traits



We are looking for someone who is:



•?  ?Highly detail-oriented

•?  ?Able to execute fast under deadlines

•?  ?Comfortable working remotely and independently

•?  ?Able to handle multiple projects simultaneously

•?  ?Always learning new tools, especially AI tools



?



This Role Is NOT For You If



•?  ?You only design social media graphics

•?  ?You don’t understand marketing funnels

•?  ?You struggle with mobile design

•?  ?You cannot work independently

•?  ?You avoid learning new tools



?



Application Process



To be considered for this role, applicants will go through:



1?? Portfolio review

2?? Timed design assignments

3?? Final interview



Only candidates who demonstrate speed, accuracy, and attention to detail will proceed.



?



Why Join Us



You will work alongside a high-performance marketing team building scalable businesses for experts and entrepreneurs.



You will gain exposure to:



•?  ?High-level funnel strategy

•?  ?Conversion optimization

•?  ?Paid advertising creative strategy

•?  ?AI-powered marketing workflows



If you are keen to work with our driven, collaborative and value-creating team, please complete the form below for consideration, and you will be notified once your application has been processed.

title: Social Media Manager
description:
We are Singapore’s fastest growing performance marketing agency seeking

Social Media Manager

(1 full-time, remote position available)



You are a creative, strategic, and highly organized content creator who lives and breathes social media. You don’t just post for the sake of it — you understand the psychology of scroll-stopping content, the power of storytelling, and how to turn followers into fans, and fans into clients. You are data-driven, always testing what works, and you're obsessed with content that not only looks good — but converts.



We are Singapore’s fastest growing performance marketing agency that specialises in helping speakers, coaches, and service-based businesses build and scale million dollar offers through paid ads, funnels, and high-level mentorship.



We are seeking a Social Media Manager to drive the growth of our online presence, build our personal and agency brand, and turn our content into a client acquisition machine. You’ll work closely with our copywriters, media team, and CEO to plan, create, and publish compelling content across multiple platforms.



RESPONSIBILITIES:

Create high-converting content (reels, carousels, captions, short-form videos) using existing video footage, testimonials, and UGC

Repurpose long-form content (e.g. webinars, podcast, masterclasses) into short-form assets

Work with designers, editors, and writers to ensure quality output that aligns with our brand voice

Analyze performance data and iterate content based on insights and platform best practices



BRAND BUILDING & ENGAGEMENT

Grow and maintain a strong online presence for our CEO, COO and agency across all major platforms

Manage community engagement (responding to comments, DMs, and nurturing prospects)

Research trends, hooks, and viral formats to keep our content fresh and attention-grabbing

Create and maintain a swipe file of best-performing social content across industries



CAMPAIGN SUPPORT & LAUNCHES

Collaborate with our paid ads and funnel team to align organic content with launches and ongoing campaigns

Support
, ad, and launch strategies with complementary organic content

Track performance of content leading to conversions, leads, and webinar sign-ups

Brainstorm new content angles with the CEO and team for upcoming campaigns



REQUIREMENTS:

Strong command of English writing and storytelling (a must)

Proven experience managing social media for personal brands or agencies

A strong eye for design, layout, and visual storytelling (experience with Canva or Adobe tools is a plus)

Able to work independently and manage your own content calendar

Familiarity with marketing, sales psychology, and funnel strategy is preferred

Experience with Reels/TikTok editing, YouTube Shorts, or repurposing video content is a huge bonus

Obsessive about deadlines, details, and making things look damn good

Comfortable receiving feedback and iterating quickly



Bonus:

Experience working in the digital marketing, coaching, or SaaS space

Familiarity with GoHighLevel, Asana, Google Drive, or content scheduling tools





If you’re excited about building a social media machine that gets real business results and want to work with a high-performing, collaborative, and fun team — we’d love to hear from you.

Please complete the form below for consideration, and you will be notified once your application has been processed:

title: Social Media Manager
description:
Role Overview

We are seeking a highly creative, organized, and data-driven Social Media Manager to take the reins of our digital presence. You will be the voice and face of Amore Greenery across all major social platforms (primarily Instagram, TikTok, and Pinterest). The ideal candidate has an eye for aesthetic photography, a knack for engaging storytelling, and a genuine passion for all things green.



Key Responsibilities

Content Strategy & Creation: Develop and execute a comprehensive social media strategy aligned with our brand goals. Shoot, edit, and produce high-quality photo and video content (Reels, TikToks, Stories) featuring our latest plant drops and care tutorials.



Community Management: Actively engage with our "plant parent" community. Respond to comments, DMs, and mentions promptly, fostering a positive, helpful, and vibrant online environment.



Content Calendar: Plan, schedule, and publish daily content using social media management tools (e.g., Sprout Social, Later, or Hootsuite).



Influencer & Partnerships: Identify and collaborate with plant influencers, home decor creators, and eco-friendly brands for giveaways, takeovers, and cross-promotions.



Analytics & Reporting: Track key performance metrics (follower growth, engagement rate, conversions) and generate monthly reports. Use these insights to optimize future campaigns.



Trend Forecasting: Stay up-to-date with social media trends, algorithm changes, and viral audio to keep Amore Greenery relevant and highly visible.



Qualifications

Experience: 2–4 years of experience managing social media accounts for a consumer-facing brand (lifestyle, home decor, or eco-focused brands preferred).



Visual Aesthetic: Strong photography, videography, and editing skills. Proficiency in Canva, Adobe Creative Suite, or mobile editing apps (like CapCut).



Copywriting: Excellent written communication skills with the ability to write witty, engaging, and educational captions.



Platform Expertise: Deep understanding of Instagram, TikTok, Pinterest, and
 algorithms and best practices.



Plant Knowledge: A genuine love for plants and a basic understanding of plant care (you know your Monsteras from your Pothos!).



What We Offer

Competitive Salary: Commensurate with experience.



Generous Employee Discount: 40% off all plants, pots, and accessories to build your own indoor jungle.



Health & Wellness: Comprehensive medical, dental, and vision insurance.



Flexible Work: A hybrid or fully remote work environment with flexible hours.



Growth Opportunities: Professional development budget for courses and conferences.

title: youtube video editor
description:
I’m looking for a creative and reliable video editor to help edit my YouTube vlogs on a weekly basis. My content focuses on lifestyle, day-in-my-life, travel, and occasional business videos, all with a strong girl vlog aesthetic.



Responsibilities:

    •    Clean up audio by removing filler words (like “um,” “and,” “but”) especially in business-style clips

    •    Maintain a consistent and recognizable editing style

    •    Deliver content on a weekly schedule



Style I’m Looking For:

    •    Soft, feminine “girl vlog” aesthetic

    •    Clean, aesthetic, and visually pleasing

    •    Smooth transitions and natural pacing

    •    Use of trending vlog-style edits (montages, quick cuts, minimal zooms)

    •    Good music selection that matches mood (chill, pretty, lifestyle vibes)

    •    Polished, clear cuts for business-related talking segments



Requirements:

    •    Experience editing YouTube or lifestyle/vlog content

    •    Proficient in Final Cut Pro, Adobe Premiere Pro, or similar

    •    Strong sense of aesthetic and storytelling

    •    Attention to detail, especially with dialogue editing

    •    Good communication and open to feedback

    •    Consistent turnaround time



Bonus (Not Required):

    •    Experience editing “girl vlog” or influencer-style content

    •    Understanding of YouTube retention and pacing

    •    Ability to suggest creative ideas/trends



Details:

    •    Ongoing weekly work

    •    Pay: to be discussed

    •    Please send portfolio or examples of similar edits

title: Ecommerce Operations Assistant

mbers

Good communication skills

You should be comfortable working across teams, solving problems, and keeping operations running smoothly behind the scenes.
